heading: Command and supervision
label: 9434 Command and supervision

children.label: a
children.text: The immediate government of the Academy is under the Superintendent, who is also the commanding officer of the Academy and of the military post.

children.label: b
children.text: The permanent professors and the director of admissions exercise command only in the academic department of the Academy.
